item.title: 生产力激增的阴暗面正浮出水面
item.description: 效率的提升既可通过增加产出实现，也可通过裁减员工达成。【原文：Efficiency improvements can come from increasing output — or by cutting workers.】

item.title: 马斯克的随性推文再陷法律风险
item.description: 亿万富翁作证称，他在推特收购案中的推文并非其最明智之举【原文：Billionaire testifies the posts on his Twitter takeover not among his smartest】

item.title: 智能戒指制造商Oura收购专注语音与手势识别初创公司
item.description: Oura Health Oy公司正收购一家手势识别初创企业，为其热门智能戒指产品线未来集成此类操控功能铺路。【原文：Oura Health Oy is buying a gesture-recognition startup, setting up the company to eventually add such controls to its popular line of smart rings.】

item.title: 中东战事扰乱航运，空运成本持续攀升
item.description: 随着战争附加费的实施，海运成本也在不断攀升。【原文：Ocean shipping is getting costlier, too, as war surcharges kick in】

item.title: 能源危机扼杀降息预期，战事颠覆欧洲债券市场
item.description: 欧洲债券市场的稳定仅维持了一天。【原文：A stabilization in European bond markets lasted just one day.】

item.title: 阿达尼集团将大用户天然气价格上调三倍，因战争导致供应中断
item.description: 阿达尼道达尔天然气公司将工业用户超出每日配额40%的天然气供应价格上调三倍，因中东战事导致燃料供应紧张。【原文：Adani Total Gas Ltd. tripled the prices of gas supplied to industrial consumers beyond 40% of their daily allocation, as the war in the Middle East squeezes fuel availability.】

item.title: 塔塔咨询服务公司正就印度新建更多人工智能数据中心进行"深入"谈判
item.description: 塔塔咨询服务公司（Tata Consultancy Services Ltd.）刚与OpenAI达成协议，将在印度建设人工智能数据中心，目前正与其他科技巨头洽谈更多合作，这表明该公司致力于重塑商业模式，以把握新兴技术带来的机遇。【原文：Tata Consultancy Services Ltd., which just cut an agreement with OpenAI to build data centers for artificial intelligence in India, is nearing additional deals with other tech giants, signaling a commitment to reshaping its business model to capitalize on the emerging technology.】

item.title: 韩国引领新兴市场反弹，伊朗推动市场波动
item.description: 韩国股市创下近二十年来最佳单日表现，引领新兴市场股市复苏。因有迹象表明伊朗可能准备缓和与美国及以色列持续六天的冲突，风险资产因此获得提振。【原文：The best day on South Korea’s stock market in nearly two decades is leading a recovery in emerging-market equities as signals that Iran may be ready to reduce tensions in its six-day war with the US and Israel boosted riskier assets.】

item.title: 华尔街预见人工智能的"创造性破坏"将席卷整个企业界
item.description: 近期股市正涌动着新的忧虑：整个企业而非仅其员工，都可能面临失业风险。尽管多数经济学家认为对人工智能引发就业末日的担忧被夸大了，但科技重大突破后确实曾引发过剧变。【原文：A new worry is rippling across the stock market lately: entire businesses, not just their employees, may be thrown out of work. While most economists say fears of an AI job apocalypse are overblown, seismic shifts have happened in the past after big tech breakthroughs.】

item.title: 八张图表揭示特朗普关税政策下美加关系"断裂"
item.description: 拉詹·阿罗拉对加拿大与美国之间的贸易动荡并不陌生。【原文：Rajan Arora is no stranger to trade turmoil between Canada and the US.】

item.title: 欧元与加元揭示投资者眼中的风险所在
item.description:
油价飙升推升加元，导致欧元等主要货币下跌。 

【原文：

Common currency slumps on oil-price surge that lifts the Canadian dollar. 

】

item.title: Revolut申请美国银行牌照，金融科技公司任命美国首席执行官
item.description: Revolut Ltd.已申请美国银行牌照，并任命前Visa公司高管担任该地区负责人。这家总部位于伦敦的金融科技巨头正全力推进其雄心勃勃的扩张计划，进军全球最大市场。【原文：Revolut Ltd. has applied for a US banking license and appointed a former Visa Inc. executive as chief for the region, as the London-based financial technology giant rolls out its ambitious plans to expand in the world’s biggest market.】

item.title: 银行扩大使用SRT对冲风险，销售额创历史新高
item.description: 银行正以创纪录的速度进行大规模风险转移，通过这一工具对更广泛的贷款进行对冲，包括杠杆收购和基金融资。【原文：Banks are issuing significant risk transfers at a record pace as they use the tool to hedge a wider range of loans, including leveraged buyouts and fund financing.】

item.title: 英国央行调查显示：伊朗战争前英国物价压力已趋缓
item.description: 英国央行对首席财务官的定期调查显示，在中东冲突爆发前，英国企业对通胀和工资的预期已逐渐趋近央行目标，但仍处于令人不安的高位。【原文：UK business expectations of inflation and wages were gradually falling into line with Bank of England targets before the conflict in the Middle East began but were still uncomfortably high, the bank’s regular survey of chief finance officers showed.】

item.title: 刚果称叛军控制的钽矿发生山体滑坡致多人死亡
item.description: 刚果民主共和国矿业部称，周二叛军控制的一处主要钽矿开采区发生山体滑坡，造成多人死亡。【原文：The Democratic Republic of Congo’s mines ministry said a landslide in a major tantalum mining area occupied by rebels left many dead on Tuesday.】

item.title: 高端企业重返欧洲债市，结束一周缺席
item.description: 包括贝克休斯公司在内的借款方正推出欧洲一周来首批高评级企业债券交易，此前因中东冲突导致市场活动近乎停滞数日，如今交易活动正逐步回升。【原文：Borrowers including Baker Hughes Co. are offering Europe’s first high-grade corporate debt deals in a week, as activity cranks up following several days of near standstill due to conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 亚洲石油危机加剧引发燃料囤积与价格上涨
item.description: 亚洲地区日益加剧的能源短缺正冲击着石油市场的各个角落，从船舶燃料到烹饪燃气的供应商们纷纷开始削减销售量，以应对不断萎缩的库存。【原文：A deepening energy crunch across Asia is impacting all corners of the oil market, with suppliers of everything from shipping fuel to cooking gas beginning to cut back on sales in order to manage shrinking stockpiles.】

item.title: 交易员转向加元避险，伊朗战争风险冲击市场
item.description: 随着中东战争持续，加元因其与油价的联动性，已成为日均交易额达9.5万亿美元的外汇市场中的热门选择。【原文：The Canadian dollar has become a top pick in the $9.5-trillion-a-day foreign exchange market due to its link to oil prices as the war in the Middle East grinds on.】

item.title: 伊朗局势持续恶化，引发市场恐慌情绪蔓延，导致分散交易陷入混乱局面
item.description: 中东地区不断升级的冲突已冲击到一种流行的对冲基金策略，若市场波动持续，恐将蔓延至更广泛的市场。【原文：The escalating conflict in the Middle East has jolted a popular hedge fund strategy, threatening a spillover into broader markets if volatility persists.】

item.title: 京东集团因中国消费疲软录得四年来的首次亏损
item.description: 尽管政府推出补贴政策以提振家电等大宗商品需求，但由于高成本的食品配送业务扩张，京东集团近四年来首次出现季度亏损。【原文：JD.com Inc. reported its first quarterly loss in nearly four years following a costly foray into food delivery, despite government subsidies aimed at boosting demand for big-ticket items like home appliances.】

item.title: 高盛、瑞银等投行瞄准艺电收购案，拟分拆40亿欧元/105亿美元债务出售
item.description: 知情人士透露，参与电子艺界公司创纪录杠杆收购融资的银行，计划将大部分债务拆分为两部分：面向美国市场的105亿美元债券发行，以及面向欧洲市场的40亿欧元（约合46.5亿美元）债券发行。【原文：Banks selling down the financing backing the record leveraged buyout of Electronic Arts Inc. are set to split the bulk of the debt between a $10.5 billion offering for the US market and a €4 billion ($4.65 billion) package in Europe, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 埃隆·马斯克力挺"JD·万斯2.0"，部分共和党人对此存疑
item.description:
迄今为止，马斯克超级政治行动委员会的资金对肯塔基州竞选的影响甚微。

【原文：

So far, Musk’s super PAC money has done little to sway a Kentucky race.

】

item.title: 美国稀土公司即将收购圆顶矿床剩余股权
item.description: 据知情人士透露，美国稀土公司正计划通过全股票交易收购得克萨斯州某稀土矿床剩余少数股权，该交易估值约为7300万美元。【原文：USA Rare Earth Inc. is planning to acquire the remaining minority interest of a Texas rare earth deposit in an all-stock transaction that values the deal at about $73 million, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 欧洲央行行长纳格尔称，央行对伊朗战争引发通胀影响保持高度警惕
item.description: 欧洲央行理事会成员约阿希姆·纳格尔表示，欧洲央行正极其谨慎地监测伊朗战争导致的能源成本飙升所产生的影响，并将参考预测数据来决定是否需要采取行动。【原文：The European Central Bank is monitoring the impact of surging energy costs due to the Iran war extremely carefully and will consult projections to decide whether action is needed, according to Governing Council member Joachim Nagel.】

item.title: 中国将稀土、机器人纳入制造业优先发展领域
item.description: 中国承诺加倍投入高端科技产品生产，以巩固其制造业大国地位，尽管北京的雄心在外国首都引发警觉。【原文：China pledged to double down on the production of high-end tech goods to bolster its status as a manufacturing powerhouse, even as Beijing’s ambition raises alarms in foreign capitals.】

item.title: 欧元下跌凸显能源冲击是最大脆弱点
item.description: 欧元汇率持续走低，油价与天然气价格的飙升凸显了欧洲的脆弱性：当能源成本攀升时，该地区的贸易收支状况恶化，而欧元汇率往往会反映这种压力。【原文：The euro is sliding as a surge in oil and natural gas prices calls attention to Europe’s vulnerability: when energy gets expensive, the region’s trade balance deteriorates and the currency tends to reflect the pain.】

item.title: 莫迪罕见谈及中东局势，美军击沉伊朗军舰
item.description: 印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪表示，军事冲突——无论是在乌克兰还是中东——都无法解决问题。这是美国在斯里兰卡海岸击沉伊朗军舰后，他首次公开发表相关言论。【原文：Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi said military conflict — whether in Ukraine or the Middle East — cannot resolve problems, in his first public remarks since the US sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka’s coast.】

item.title: 英伟达合作伙伴鸿海全球人工智能建设销售额攀升22%
item.description: 鸿海精密工业股份有限公司2026年前两个月营收增长21.6%，凸显了英伟达公司服务器在全球人工智能发展中的关键需求。【原文：Hon Hai Precision Industry Co.’s revenue rose 21.6% in the first two months of 2026, underscoring demand for the Nvidia Corp. servers vital to global AI development.】

item.title: 大亨钱达里亚力邀投资者入驻肯尼亚家族办公室
item.description: 达尚·钱达里亚，肯尼亚历史最悠久的综合企业集团之一首席执行官，正致力于提升治理标准，并通过设立家族办公室为集团旗下各业务板块的投资开辟路径。【原文：Darshan Chandaria, the chief executive officer of one of Kenya’s oldest conglomerates, is seeking to boost governance standards and create a path for investments into the group’s various businesses with a family office.】

item.title: 英国2月住宅建设放缓加剧，PMI数据显示
item.description: 一项备受关注的调查显示，英国2月份建筑活动意外加速下滑，其中住宅建设尤为疲软。【原文：UK construction activity unexpectedly declined at a sharper pace in February, according to a closely watched survey, with housebuilding particularly weak.】
